description: Dark-background call-to-action page with gradient headline, description text, two action buttons (primary filled + secondary outline), and decorative glow effects. Energetic, forward-looking feel for prompting audience action.

text_slots.description: Small label above the headline (e.g., 'Call to action')
First line of the bold headline
Second line of the bold headline
Small footer hint text (e.g., keyboard shortcuts or disclaimer)
